Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Adrienne]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Adrienne is Malachi's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Adrienne is rumored to be the one who keeps Malachi's realm running smoothly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus is a Damascan lady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus is Malachi's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Adrienne is Malachi's wife and is managing the realm.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus is mourning her husband.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Adrienne is a Lady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus resides in Bel Calem.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
